name: Modern Horizons 2

draft.notes: Extra new-to-Modern reprint slot between uncommons and the rare (can be uncommon, rare, or mythic): 10 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 reprint + 1 rare + ad card. Foil (~33% of boosters) displaces a common and appears after the rare. Rare slot rates: 78% normal rare, 13% mythic, 8% non-borderless variant, 1% borderless; mythic rate 1/7.

statedRates: Foil ~33% of boosters. Rare slot: 78% rare, 13% mythic, 8% variant, 1% borderless; mythic rate 1/7. Reprint sheet: 1x each mythic, 2x each rare, 4x each uncommon.
sourceNotes: Composition counts uncommon 100 (20 reprints), rare 78 (18 new-to-Modern reprints), mythic 24 (4 reprints). Has a dedicated new-to-Modern reprint slot. Basic lands NOT included in boosters. Printed USA, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box.
